faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Oceanside homes?
faqs.answer: Oceanside's coastal location creates high humidity levels that silverfish love, especially in basements, bathrooms, and areas with poor ventilation. These moisture-loving pests are attracted to the damp conditions common in Long Island homes, particularly those near the water. Our treatments address both the pests and the environmental factors that attract them.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a silverfish infestation in Oceanside?
faqs.answer: Most Oceanside properties see significant reduction in silverfish activity within 1-2 weeks of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 3-4 weeks depending on the severity of the infestation. We provide follow-up visits to ensure all silverfish and their eggs are eliminated and offer moisture control recommendations to prevent recurrence.
